holdings.infoBox: GXUS is an equity ETF with a total of 2459 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 4.57%, Samsung Electronics at 2.63%, SK hynix at 2.17%, ASML Holding at 1.82%, and Tencent Holdings at 0.92%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs MarketBeta Total International Equity ETF (GXUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap stocks from around the world, outside of the United States, representing 85% of the publicly available market. GXUS was launched on May 31, 2023 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
